name: Smoked Pork and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 lb Smoked Ham Hocks, Cut into 1-inch Pieces
2 Tbsp Freshly Rendered Lard or Oil
Salt and Fresh Ground Pepper – To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in about 4 cups of water. Drain the beans.
2. Place the beans in a 6 quart pot along with all other ingredients except the lard/oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Cover and simmer until the hocks are tender.
4. Strain the hocks from the pot and cool. Remove the meat and discard the bones.
5. Remove 1/4 of the beans and puree with 1 cup of the cooking liquid. Return to the pot.
6. Chop the deboned meat and add to the pot. Stir all together and return the soup to a simmer.
7. Heat a small frying pan; add the lard/oil and saute the garlic for a moment.
8. Add the garlic, salt, and pepper to taste into the pot.
